name: WarehouseProvisioningHandler

neutralConcepts: CF-192: zone provisioning MUST follow raw→staging→core→mart order — no skipping
F463 IRlsPolicyService.registerPolicy() called for EACH zone (4 calls total)
F459 IWarehouseAuditService.recordProvisioning() called after all zones provisioned

ironRules.rule: CF-192: zones MUST be provisioned in raw→staging→core→mart order — no skipping.
F463 IRlsPolicyService.registerPolicy() called for each zone — 4 calls minimum.
WarehouseTenantProvisioned MUST include zonesProvisioned and rlsPoliciesRegistered: true.
Zone index MUST be tenant-namespaced: xiigen-warehouse-{tenantId}-{zone}.

keywords: warehouse provisioning handler CF-192 zone order raw staging core mart RLS per zone IWarehouseAuditService F459 F463 WarehouseTenantProvisioned zonesProvisioned rlsPoliciesRegistered tenant-namespaced
